overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Resident Evil 4 Remake) depicting a player character in a green coat standing inside a dimly lit, multi-level wooden merchant's shop. The environment features warm lantern lighting, shelves of goods, and a merchant NPC reading at his counter while the player observes.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden merchant shop interior with elevated balcony

events.description: player character turns head to the right to look at the merchant

agents.ego_description: standing still inside the shop, occasionally turning head to observe the merchant and surroundings

notable_agents.action: merchant sitting at counter reading a book, occasionally gesturing with his hands

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit filled with bottles and jars against the left wall
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the ceiling providing primary illumination
wooden counter with various goods and a decorative skull on display
wooden railing of an upper level overlooking the main shop floor
animal skull placed on the merchant's counter as decoration

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in a dimly lit wooden merchant's shop, observing the environment. Warm light from hanging lanterns illuminates shelves of goods on the left and a merchant reading at his counter on the right. The multi-level interior features an upper balcony, and the scene remains static with only subtle head movements from the player character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within a dimly lit wooden merchant's shop, focusing on the quiet interaction between the player and the environment. It begins with the player character standing still, observing the multi-level interior where warm light from hanging lanterns casts a soft glow over the space. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses shelves of goods lining the left wall and an upper balcony overlooking the room. The scene then settles on the merchant reading at his counter to the right, while the only movement comes from the player's subtle head shifts as they take in the surroundings.
